# `btpc create`

<!-- Generated by `scripts/generate-cli-reference.sh`; do not edit. -->

Create canonical v1, v2, or hybrid metainfo from a file or directory

**Parent:** [`btpc`](index.md)

See [Configuration and global flags](../configuration.md) and [Exit codes and streams](../index.md#exit-codes-and-streams).

## Synopsis

```text
Usage: btpc create [OPTIONS] [INPUTS]...
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `<INPUTS>` | Payload files or directories |

## Options

| Option | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `--batch, <BATCH>` | Versioned TOML batch manifest |
| `--mode, <MODE>` | Torrent protocol representation Values: `v1`, `v2`, `hybrid`. |
| `-o, --output, <OUTPUT>` | Destination .torrent path (defaults beside the payload) |
| `--output-dir, <OUTPUT_DIR>` | Write batch outputs beneath this directory |
| `--jobs, <JOBS>` | Maximum concurrent batch creation jobs Default: `1`. |
| `--fail-fast` | Stop scheduling batch jobs after the first failure Default: `false`. |
| `-f, --force` | Replace an existing destination Default: `false`. |
| `--durable` | Sync the destination directory after atomic publication where supported Default: `false`. |
| `--preset, <PRESETS>` | Apply a named creation preset; may be repeated |
| `--piece-length, <PIECE_LENGTH>` | Explicit piece length in bytes |
| `--target-pieces, <TARGET_PIECES>` | Target approximate number of pieces for automatic selection |
| `--max-piece-length, <MAX_PIECE_LENGTH>` | Cap target-based automatic piece length |
| `-a, --tracker, <TRACKERS>` | Add a tracker as its own tier; may be repeated |
| `--clear-trackers` | Clear configured and preset trackers before CLI additions Default: `false`. |
| `--tracker-tier, <TRACKER_TIER>` | Add one comma-separated tracker tier; may be repeated |
| `--tracker-alias, <TRACKER_ALIASES>` | Add a configured tracker alias; may be repeated |
| `--tracker-group, <TRACKER_GROUPS>` | Add a configured tracker group; may be repeated |
| `--web-seed, <WEB_SEEDS>` | Add a web seed URL; may be repeated |
| `--clear-web-seeds` | Clear configured and preset web seeds before CLI additions Default: `false`. |
| `--node, <NODES>` | Add a DHT node as HOST:PORT; may be repeated |
| `--private` | Set the private flag Default: `false`. |
| `--public` | Set the private flag to false Default: `false`. |
| `--source, <SOURCE>` | Set the source field |
| `--clear-source` | Remove configured or preset source metadata Default: `false`. |
| `--comment, <COMMENT>` | Set the top-level comment |
| `--clear-comment` | Remove configured or preset comment metadata Default: `false`. |
| `--created-by, <CREATED_BY>` | Set the creator string |
| `--no-created-by, --clear-created-by` | Omit the creator string instead of using the versioned default Default: `false`. |
| `--creation-date, <CREATION_DATE>` | Include an explicit Unix creation timestamp |
| `--entropy, <ENTROPY>` | Set deterministic, random, or omitted entropy policy |
| `--name, <NAME>` | Override the torrent root name |
| `--exclude-hidden` | Exclude dot-prefixed files and directories Default: `false`. |
| `--symlinks, <SYMLINKS>` | Symbolic-link policy Values: `reject`, `skip`, `follow`. |
| `--special-files, <SPECIAL_FILES>` | Special-file policy Values: `reject`, `skip`. |
| `--exclude-empty-files` | Exclude zero-length files Default: `false`. |
| `--reject-empty-directories` | Reject empty directories instead of ignoring them Default: `false`. |
| `--include, <INCLUDES>` | Include only paths matching this glob; may be repeated |
| `--clear-includes` | Clear configured and preset include patterns before CLI additions Default: `false`. |
| `--exclude, <EXCLUDES>` | Exclude paths matching this glob; may be repeated |
| `--clear-excludes` | Clear configured and preset exclude patterns before CLI additions Default: `false`. |
| `--threads, <THREADS>` | v1 hashing threads; 0 selects a conservative automatic count, 1 is sequential |
| `--dry-run` | Plan creation without hashing or writing metainfo Default: `false`. |
| `--print, <PRINT>` | Print selected result fields; may be repeated Values: `path`, `info-hash-v1`, `info-hash-v2`, `magnet`. |
| `--json` | Emit a versioned JSON result to stdout Default: `false`. |
| `--pretty` | Use the expanded human completion renderer Default: `false`. |
| `-h, --help` | Print help |

## Global options

| Option | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `--config, <PATH>` | Use this configuration file when configuration loading is enabled |
| `--no-config` | Disable implicit and environment-selected configuration Default: `false`. |
| `--color, <COLOR>` | Control colored terminal output Values: `auto`, `always`, `never`. |
| `-v, --verbose` | Increase diagnostic verbosity; may be repeated Default: `0`. |
| `-q, --quiet` | Suppress human summaries, warnings, and progress Default: `false`. |

## Example

```console
$ btpc create --help
```
